steps.title: Spot the additive relationship
steps.content: The sentence before the blank states that many of the 206 ticker‑tape parades were for aviation achievements, and the sentence after the blank adds that Earhart's parade was just one of the 16 honoring pilots – this shows an additive relationship that needs a transition meaning “in addition”.

steps.title: Apply the additive transition
steps.content: “In addition” signals that the upcoming idea adds another point to the previous claim about aviation‑achievement parades. Indeed merely reinforces rather than adds, Nevertheless introduces a contrast that isn’t present, and Therefore implies a conclusion that doesn’t follow. That matches choice A — A is correct.
